ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the facility */,
  "membercost" REAL /* Cost for members to use the facility */,
  "guestcost" REAL /* Cost for guests to use the facility */,
  "initialoutlay" REAL /* Initial investment for setting up the facility */,
  "monthlymaintenance" REAL /* Monthly maintenance cost for the facility */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* The number of people the facility can accommodate */,
  "location" TEXT /* The physical location of the facility within the center */,
  "availability" INTEGER /* A flag indicating whether the facility is currently available for booking */,
  "lastmaintenancedate" TEXT /* The date of the last maintenance activity */,
  "nextmaintenancedate" TEXT /* The scheduled date of the next maintenance activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facid")
)

CREATE TABLE "memberships" (
  "membershipid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each membership plan */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the membership plan */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the plan */,
  "monthlyfee" REAL /* Monthly fee for the membership plan */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the membership plan (e.g., 1 month, 6 months, 1 year) */,
  "renewaldiscount" REAL /* Discount percentage for members who renew their membership */,
  "benefits" TEXT /* Additional benefits included in the membership plan */,
  "maxfacilities" INTEGER /* Maximum number of facilities a member can book at one time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("membershipid")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "memberid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "membershipid" INTEGER /* Membership plan ID */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the member */,
  "emergencycontactname" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergencycontactphone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "paymentmethod" TEXT /* Preferred payment method */,
  "paymentdetails" TEXT /* Additional details for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("memberid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_membershipid FOREIGN KEY ("membershipid") REFERENCES memberships ("membershipid")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings" (
  "bookingid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking */,
  "facid" INTEGER /* Facility ID */,
  "memberid" INTEGER /* Member ID */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date of the booking */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the booking */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the booking */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the booking */,
  "paymentstatus" TEXT /* Payment status of the booking */,
  "createddate" TEXT /* Date the booking was created */,
  "modifieddate" TEXT /* Date the booking was last modified */,
  "canceleddate" TEXT /* Date the booking was canceled (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookingid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_facid FOREIGN KEY ("facid") REFERENCES facilities ("facid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_memberid FOREIGN KEY ("memberid") REFERENCES members ("memberid")
)

CREATE TABLE "bookings_guests" (
  "booking_guestid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest in a booking */,
  "bookingid" INTEGER /* Booking ID */,
  "guest_name" TEXT /* Name of the guest */,
  "guest_email" TEXT /* Email address of the guest */,
  "guest_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the guest */,
  "paymentstatus" TEXT /* Payment status of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("booking_guestid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bookings_guests_bookingid FOREIGN KEY ("bookingid") REFERENCES bookings ("bookingid")
)

CREATE TABLE "invoices" (
  "invoiceid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invoice */,
  "memberid" INTEGER /* Member ID */,
  "bookingid" INTEGER /* Booking ID */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date the invoice was generated */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the invoice */,
  "duedate" TEXT /* Date the invoice is due */,
  "paymentdate" TEXT /* Date the invoice was paid (if applicable) */,
  "paymentmethod" TEXT /* Payment method used to pay the invoice */,
  "paymentdetails" TEXT /* Additional details for the payment method */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invoiceid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_bookingid FOREIGN KEY ("bookingid") REFERENCES bookings ("bookingid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invoices_memberid FOREIGN KEY ("memberid") REFERENCES members ("memberid")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance" (
  "maintenanceid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance activity */,
  "facid" INTEGER /* Facility ID */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance activity */,
  "technician" TEXT /* Name of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance activity */,
  "lastinspectiondate" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "nextinspectiondate" TEXT /* Scheduled date of the next inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenanceid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_facid FOREIGN KEY ("facid") REFERENCES facilities ("facid")
)
